findings.description: The source file has 8 h2-level headings (all using `-` adornment: 本項で説明する内容, 作成手順, 画面イメージ, 概要, 入力画面の作成方法, 確認画面の作成方法, 共通化の指針, 次に読むもの) but the knowledge file has only 4 sections. Five h2-level source sections (作成手順, 画面イメージ, 概要, 入力画面の作成方法, 確認画面の作成方法) are all merged into s2. While the substantive content appears preserved, this is a significant structural consolidation flagged by the automated pre-check (S9).
findings.source_evidence: RST h2 headings using `-` adornment: `------------------本項で説明する内容`, `--------作成手順`, `------------画面イメージ`, `----概要`, `------------------入力画面の作成方法`, `------------------確認画面の作成方法`, `------------共通化の指針`, `------------次に読むもの` — 8 total vs 4 knowledge sections
